name: Flower Plush Stuffed Animal - Cloud Island™
description:
Add a playful floral accent to their toy collection with the Flower Plush Stuffed Toy from Cloud Island™. This stuffed toy is designed as a flower with green leaves and a fun smile for a cute look. Made from 100% recycled polyester fabric, this plush toy is suggested for ages newborn and above.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
